lead: Facts on this page are verified against the authoritative sources below.

sources.label: EDCD · EDMarketConnector
sources.what: Machine-readable in-game rank-name strings for all six pilot ladders, cross-checked tier order including Novice (Combat) and the CQC upper tiers.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Wiki — Ranks
sources.what: Ordered tier lists for the six pilot fields plus Elite I–V, the navy rank names, and the Triple Elite milestone.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Wiki — Pilots Federation
sources.what: PF founding (2805), mutual-protection and bounty role, the CMDR title, and the Elite-badge history (Peter Jameson).

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Wiki — Shinrarta Dezhra
sources.what: Founders World permit auto-granted at Elite in Combat/Trade/Exploration/Mercenary/Exobiology; CQC excluded; Jameson Memorial discount.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Wiki — Exobiologist
sources.what: Sampling loop, Vista Genomics sale, Update-14 payout buff, and the Artemis-suit cosmetic unlocks.

sources.label: Frontier Forums — new-ranks benefits thread
sources.what: Confirms Mercenary / Exobiologist sub-Elite rewards are decals + suit cosmetics with mission-pay scaling.

sources.label: INARA — Rankings
sources.what: Cross-check of pilot and navy rank names and the standings ladder.
